probes.q: Can Perseus Vault work without any internet connection, and how?
probes.answer: Yes, Perseus Vault can operate without an internet connection. It does so by running in an air-gapped environment where the option `--offline` is enabled. This mode disables all network calls to meet Information Lifecycle Management Level 5 (IL5) and Interface Control Document-50

probes.q: What happens to memories that are never accessed?
probes.answer: According to the given context [key: f3], Ebbinghaus decay affects unused memories. This implies that memories which are never accessed will fade over time due to this decay process.
